case_title: THE STATE BAR OF CALIFORNIA VS. MARK L WEBER

docket_entries.description: SUMMARY JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE STATE BAR OF CALIFORNIA AS TO DEFENDANT WEBER, MARK L (SBN 207644) JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE BY MAIL ON REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT, JUDGMENT, AND NTC OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT BY THE STATE BAR FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE STATE BAR OF CALIFORNIA
